sentences.text: Thanks for calling main Street renewal. We're looking forward to helping you if you are inquiring about one of our rental properties press one. If you would like to see a list of all of our available rental properties press two to contact the leasing agent press three, if you have already applied to a main Street renewal home press for connecting your call please hold done. Please hold while I connect you to one of our agents.
